message:
chore(test): suppress clippy too_many_lines warning on raptorq seed sweep test

The seed_sweep_structured_logging test legitimately requires many lines for
its 50-seed parameterized roundtrip with structured logging output. Adding
#[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] rather than splitting the test, which would
obscure the sweep logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
